title: Grabber Mod
description: A fabric mod that add's a item the pulls entities to the user of the item when right clicked
body:
# Grabber Mod
## What does it add?
A item that allows you the pull mobs and players towards you

called the grabber

### Crafting Recipe
![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18bf51fd3ee66af87cea3cf3c7d03ab2c361c2d5.png)

quick little tip use this item in offhand so you can have something else in your hotbar

## Why should you use this mod
To pull mobs and entities
## What is required to play this mod
- Fabric Loader 1.20.2 - 1.20.4
- Fabric API(0.91.6)
